question: Generic Divide-by-N with ~50% Duty Cycle
description:
Implement programmable or parameterized divide-by-N clock divider handling even and odd N.

' +
        '**Constraints:**
' +
        '- Even N: toggle every N/2 cycles
' +
        '- Odd N: use dual-edge method or define duty strategy
' +
        '- Parameterizable or runtime-configurable N
requirements: ODD: Use dual-edge method (or define duty-cycle strategy).
Test Case - N=4 gives clk/4 with 50% duty.
Test Case - N=5 gives clk/5 with defined duty characteristics.
hints: Separate counter/state generation from output register.
